positive: A stylized and symmetrical composition featuring a majestic forest creature, such as a woodland guardian or phoenix-like mythical being, caught in a moment of ethereal ascent. The creature should be rendered with strong, clean silhouettes and vibrant bioluminescent elements against a deep twilight background. Incorporate geometric patterns and abstract floral mandalas integrated into the wings and tail feathers. The overall aesthetic should be neo-fantasy, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock printing. Use a color palette dominated by deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted sharply with bright, glowing gold and cyan highlights. Perfect for repeating patterns or central print art. Full-body depiction, facing the viewer, centered composition. Cinematic volumetric lighting, crisp details, high contrast, digital painting, 8k resolution.
negative: lowres, bad anatomy, blurry, grainy, text, signature, watermark, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, poorly drawn, cluttered, messy, logos, trademarks, celebrity, cartoon, photo, realistic photo
